title: Pan-Seared Australian Dumplings
description: A simple and delicious dish of pan-seared dumplings served with a side of stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced onion and cook for 2-3 minutes until translucent.
3. Add the sliced carrots and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
4. Add the sliced zucchini and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
5. Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the Australian dumplings and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
7. If using soy sauce, brush the dumplings with it during the last minute of cooking.
8. Serve the pan-seared dumplings hot with the stir-fried vegetables.
